session.user:
Run prettier --check on these specific files and report results: - docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md - docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md - docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md - docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md - docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md
Use: npx prettier --check docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier --check on those specific files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on 5 specific documentation files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 5 files conform to Prettier code style
**Files checked:** - docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md - docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md - docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md - docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md - docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md
